title: Workprint long-chat dogfood summary
summary: Tony used Workprint dogfooding to evaluate whether provider insights explained his role, not just which evidence sources existed.
key_decisions: Tony decided that first insights must explain what the user did or where human judgment, review, or sequencing appears.
user_direction: Tony directed Workprint to treat source detection as insufficient for a first insight.
ai_fluency_notes: Discernment appears in repeated dogfood review of provider output before release.
unknowns: The summary does not include the complete chat transcript and cannot prove every intermediate decision.
limitations: Summary evidence depends on the accuracy of the user-approved summary.
